_readme: Expected-output model for out/factor_salience.csv (step 4, AGGREGATE) — the core results table (RQ ii/iii). PRIMARY metric: thread_coverage_pct_* (share of threads mentioning the factor at least once; a thread can mention several factors, so these overlap and do not sum to 100 - and the table is sorted by this). mention_share_pct is a SECONDARY, informational-only column (share of all factor mentions; sums to ~100 across rows) - it is biased by dictionary size and thread length/repetition, so it must not be used to rank or compare factors.
